targets.rawSql:
SELECT Router, Unidade, Tipo, Municipio, Provincia, Direccao, Zona, Latitude, Longitude, Status
FROM (
  SELECT h.name AS Router,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='unidade_negocio'    THEN ht.value END), h.name) AS Unidade,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='tipo_un'            THEN ht.value END), '')     AS Tipo,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='municipio'          THEN ht.value END), hi.location, '') AS Municipio,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='provincia'          THEN ht.value END), '')     AS Provincia,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='direccao_comercial' THEN ht.value END), '')     AS Direccao,
  COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='zona_comercial'     THEN ht.value END), '')     AS Zona,
  CAST(hi.location_lat AS DECIMAL(10,6)) AS Latitude,
  CAST(hi.location_lon AS DECIMAL(10,6)) AS Longitude,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.description = 'Cisco IOS: Unavailable by ICMP ping' AND t.value = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 1
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.description IN ('Cisco IOS: High ICMP ping loss','Cisco IOS: High ICMP ping response time') AND t.value = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END AS Status
  FROM hosts h
  INNER JOIN host_inventory hi ON h.hostid = hi.hostid
  INNER JOIN hosts_groups hg ON h.hostid = hg.hostid
  LEFT JOIN host_tag ht ON h.hostid = ht.hostid
  INNER JOIN functions f ON h.hostid = (SELECT i2.hostid FROM items i2 WHERE i2.itemid = f.itemid LIMIT 1)
  INNER JOIN triggers t ON f.triggerid = t.triggerid
  WHERE hg.groupid = 24
  AND hi.location_lat IS NOT NULL AND hi.location_lat != ''
  AND ('${agencia:raw}' = '__Todas__' OR h.hostid IN (
    SELECT hostid FROM host_tag WHERE tag = 'unidade_negocio' AND value = '${agencia:raw}'))
  AND ('${provincia:raw}' = '%' OR h.hostid IN (
    SELECT hostid FROM host_tag WHERE tag = 'provincia' AND value = '${provincia:raw}'))
  GROUP BY h.hostid, h.name, hi.location_lat, hi.location_lon, hi.location
) sub
WHERE ('${status_filter:raw}' = '%' OR Status = CAST('${status_filter:raw}' AS UNSIGNED))
ORDER BY Status ASC
